February 3rd ,2025, English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES)

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Program 2024-2025 Academic Year Fall Semester DÜİYES Procedures and Principles

Dear Students,

The 2024-2025 Spring Semester English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered on Monday, February 3rd, and invigilated face-to-face on Dudullu Campus. The exam consists of two sessions, and students must attend both sessions.

The students are to be present in the class where they will take the exam at 09.30 so that the invigilators can check the students’ ID cards on time.

Students must have a valid ID with a photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam. You have to present a valid ID to be admitted to the exam.

The students need to bring a blue pen, pencil and an eraser.

DÜİYES results will be announced on February 7th on OBS (Student information system).
